event_decisions.change_summary_template: The general B.S. Cloud Computing program was replaced in 2022 by three specialized vendor-track programs. Approximately 7% of prior courses were retained; the curriculum was substantially rebuilt for each track.
event_decisions.notes: Jaccard 0.071. Approved §6.1. Wording guard required. PLE-027 covers an intermediate step in the same chain and is suppressed.

event_decisions.change_summary_template: This program was rebuilt in August 2022 as part of the B.S. Network Engineering and Security family. Fewer than 5% of prior courses were carried forward; the curriculum was substantially redesigned.
event_decisions.notes: Jaccard 0.043–0.045. Approved §6.1. Lowest-overlap event in include set. Wording guard required.

Jaccard 0.044. BSHSC (Health Services Coordination) vs. BSHHS (Health and Human Services) are semantically distinct program names. Requires health curriculum expert to confirm internal WGU linkage. Default on no confirmation: reject_history.

event_decisions.change_summary_template: This program replaced the B.S. Software Development in January 2023. The curriculum was substantially rebuilt — approximately 6–11% of prior courses were carried forward, with new content developed for the Software Engineering designation.

This program replaced the B.S. Data Management/Data Analytics (BSDMDA) in July 2023. The curriculum was substantially rebuilt: 33 new courses were introduced, 30 prior courses were retired, and 9 courses were carried forward. The data management component was removed in favor of a dedicated analytics focus.

This program replaced the B.S. Business Administration — Healthcare Management (BSBAHC) in July 2023. The degree was restructured as a standalone Healthcare Administration program; the Business Administration framework was retired.
event_decisions.notes: Structural parallel to approved PLE-014. Same boundary (EVT-018), same school, same rename pattern. Individual pair Jaccard not directly confirmed — verify before final publish.

event_decisions.change_summary_template: This program launched in February 2026 as part of a restructuring of the M.S. Information Technology Management (MSITM). The curriculum was entirely rebuilt; no courses were directly carried over from the prior program.
event_decisions.zero_overlap_rationale: MSITM used a legacy course series. The successor programs were built on an entirely new course series at program launch. The zero course overlap reflects a complete curriculum refresh rather than a break in organizational lineage — IT Management to Information Technology is a confirmed institutional succession per the 2026-01→02 boundary event.
event_decisions.notes: Jaccard 0.0 across all pairs. Approved §6.1 under §5.6 (semantic continuity). Only zero-Jaccard event in include set. zero_overlap_rationale required before export.

Jaccard 0.0. MHL (Health Leadership) vs. MHA (Healthcare Administration). Cannot confirm linkage from artifacts alone. Key question: did WGU internally describe MHA as replacing MHL? If confirmed: approve_history with rebuilt framing. If not: reject_history.

event_decisions.change_summary_template: This M.B.A. specialization replaced the Healthcare Management concentration (MBAHM) in May 2025. The program was retitled as Healthcare Administration within the M.B.A. program family.
event_decisions.notes: Structural parallel to PLE-015. Clean 1-to-1 rename at single-edition boundary. Individual pair Jaccard not directly confirmed — verify before final publish.
BSRN → nursing prelicensure tracks. Policy-excluded per §6.2. Jaccard 0.0/0.054. Surfacing this transition as history would misrepresent a licensure-pathway launch as a curriculum successor.

Proposed namespace_migration with Jaccard 0.071 — anomalous for a pure rename. Intermediate step in the BSCC-to-tracks restructure already covered by approved PLE-010. Suppress to prevent double-entry for the same chain.

13-month span between from-program retirement (2022-10) and to-program launch (2023-11). Jaccard 0.0 across all 6 pairs. Must verify: was any intermediate program active in ed-tech/ID domain 2022-11 to 2023-10? If gap confirmed as discontinuity: split into separate retirement + new-launch events; do not surface as program lineage.

program_decisions.notes: Blocks on PLE-012 HITL decision. Default: hide.
Blocks on PLE-023 HITL decision. Default: hide.
Approved §6.1. Wording guard required on change_summary (see event entry).
Approved §6.1. zero_overlap_rationale confirmed on event. Wording guard required.
First-generation M.S. Computer Science program. No MSCS general predecessor in catalog. Explicit designation added to prevent false candidate generation in future pipeline runs.
First-generation M.S. Software Engineering program. BSSWE naming parallel may confuse future pipeline candidates; explicit new_from_scratch designation suppresses false matches.

Pathway variant (RN-to-MSN delivery track) of active MSNUNI. Not a lineage event — MSNUNI is still active. No predecessor was retired. Classified as pathway_variant, not new_from_scratch, to preserve the semantic distinction.

Candidate predecessor: MSSP (retired 2020-05; 6-month gap). Degree-level mismatch (M.S. research vs. M.A.T. teaching). Requires HITL: was MATSPED marketed internally as replacing MSSP? If yes: create PLE and add to include set. If no: reclassify as new_from_scratch.
PLE-025 (BSRN → nursing prelicensure) is in §6.2 exclude set. Jaccard 0.0/0.054. History is reviewed but policy-excluded; display as no history.
